overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a black sports car driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The vehicle navigates through intersections, underpasses, and futuristic plazas adorned with massive holographic advertisements and colorful floating banners, with wet streets reflecting the vibrant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge approach to downtown intersection

events.description: vehicle makes right turn at intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: driving a black sports car across an elevated bridge and turning right at a city intersection

notable_agents.action: person walking on the sidewalk near the bridge railing

entered.detail: elevated multi-lane road with concrete barriers and street lighting
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline
vertical digital screen displaying colorful advertisements on a pole
tall pole with multiple floodlights illuminating the road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway bridge at night, with the camera following a black sports car approaching a downtown intersection. The vehicle makes a right turn at the crosswalk, with skyscrapers visible in the distance and a pedestrian walking on the right sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete walls and overhead lighting

events.description: entering covered underpass with concrete walls and overhead fluorescent lighting
exiting underpass back to open street with palm trees visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating through a covered highway section with smooth concrete barriers

entered.detail: covered highway section with overhead fluorescent lighting and rough concrete walls
tropical palm tree visible near the underpass exit

segments.scene_description: The car enters a concrete underpass with artificial lighting, transitioning from the open bridge to a sheltered highway section. The environment is enclosed by concrete walls with palm trees becoming visible as the vehicle approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with shops and palm tree landscaping

events.description: vehicle makes left turn at city intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising through city streets lined with palm trees and commercial buildings with neon signage

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead in the same direction on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: building with illuminated 'softsys' signage on the facade
large vertical screen displaying character advertisements
row of tropical palm trees along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the car drives through a commercial district with palm trees lining the street and illuminated storefronts. The vehicle makes a left turn at an intersection, passing a building with 'softsys' signage and vertical digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic plaza district with floating holographic advertisement banners

events.description: entering district with colorful floating holographic banners suspended across the street
vehicle makes left turn at large intersection beneath holographic banners

agents.ego_description: driving beneath colorful holographic banners suspended across the avenue in pink, blue, and purple

entered.detail: colorful floating digital banners stretching across the street in vibrant pink, blue, and purple hues
building with distinctive curved architecture and bright illuminated signage
massive horizontal screen displaying product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The car enters a futuristic district where colorful holographic banners float overhead in a canopy of light. The vehicle navigates a left turn at a large intersection, with arched buildings and giant digital billboards lining the wide avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground tunnel with blue neon strip lighting and motion blur effects

events.description: entering dark tunnel with blue neon lights lining the walls creating light streaks
tunnel exit reveals giant holographic fish floating in the plaza ahead

agents.ego_description: speeding through a tunnel with motion blur and blue neon lighting along the walls

notable_agents.action: red sports car overtaking on the left side in the tunnel

entered.detail: underground passage with blue fluorescent strip lights creating motion blur effects on the walls
giant blue holographic koi fish swimming in the air visible at the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark tunnel illuminated by blue neon strips that create light streaks due to motion. A red sports car overtakes on the left as the tunnel opens ahead to reveal a giant blue holographic fish floating in the distant plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular plaza with massive holographic fish and spherical building structure

events.description: exiting tunnel into open plaza with giant holographic fish swimming overhead
driving under massive circular building structure with holographic projections on the ceiling

agents.ego_description: driving through a futuristic plaza beneath giant swimming holographic fish and circular architecture

entered.detail: massive circular architectural structure with holographic projections on the ceiling
giant orange holographic koi fish swimming alongside the blue one
signage displaying '25h/7' text on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The car emerges into a spectacular plaza dominated by giant holographic koi fish swimming through the air. The vehicle drives beneath a massive circular building structure with complex holographic projections on its ceiling, passing digital signage and futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a black sports car as it transitions from an elevated highway into the heart of a neon-drenched futuristic plaza. It begins on a high bridge approaching a downtown intersection, where the vehicle makes a right turn past distant skyscrapers and a lone pedestrian. The scene then shifts as the car enters a concrete underpass, moving from the open air into a sheltered corridor before emerging into a commercial district lined with palm trees and glowing softsys signage. As the vehicle navigates a series of left turns, the environment expands into a district of floating holographic banners and arched buildings, eventually plunging into a dark tunnel illuminated by streaking blue neon lights. Finally, the car emerges from the tunnel to reveal a spectacular plaza where giant holographic koi fish swim through the air beneath a massive circular structure adorned with complex digital projections.
